title: Transfer of files
doc_html:
§1360.72.  Transfer of files

The Louisiana State Board of Examiners of Psychologists shall provide the board with copies of all files relating to medical psychologists.

Acts 2009, No. 251, §11, eff. July 1, 2009.
doc_text:
§1360.72.  Transfer of files
The Louisiana State Board of Examiners of Psychologists shall provide the board with copies of all files relating to medical psychologists.
Acts 2009, No. 251, §11, eff. July 1, 2009.
